title: Customer Confirmation
description: Commerce v1 customer confirmation contract proving that the customer reviewed and confirmed an Order Draft before official order creation.
$comment: Sources: TECH-04 Customer Confirmation state model; no official order may be created from invalid, expired, or unconfirmed draft.

status.description: Confirmation status. Prefer enums/commerce/order-status.yaml values prefixed CONFIRMATION_ or CUSTOMER_.

confirmation_channel.description: Channel where confirmation happened. TODO: bind to channel-type when source policy is finalized.

valid_for_order_creation.description: Whether this confirmation can be used to create an official order.
